title: CLI: GROUP_DELIVER handler + active_groups state
description:
What: Handle incoming GROUP_DELIVER notifications in the CLI chat event loop and maintain active_groups state.

Algorithm:
1. Add to chat state:
   - active_groups: HashMap<String, GroupClientState> where key is group_id
   - struct GroupClientState { name: String, members: Vec<String> }
2. Add ClientEvent::Message match arm for rpc_methods::GROUP_DELIVER
3. Parse GroupDeliverParams { from, group_id, payload }
4. If group exists in active_groups:
   a. If mls.has_group_id(group_id.as_bytes()): decrypt via mls.process_for_group(group_id.as_bytes(), &payload)
   b. Else: treat payload as UTF-8 bytes (pre-MLS fallback)
   c. Deserialize as ClearMessage::Chat { text } and display: [group_name] from_display: text
5. If group NOT in active_groups: log warn and skip (group list not yet fetched)
6. Handle GROUP_CREATE response: insert into active_groups
7. Handle GROUP_LIST response: replace active_groups with fresh list

Defensive rules:
- Parse failure on GroupDeliverParams → warn! + continue (malformed server data)
- MLS decrypt failure → warn! + continue (epoch mismatch is possible, not fatal)
- from is relay-authenticated; display sender name via nicknames map

Team: standard R+I+T
acceptance_criteria: cargo build -p nie passes; GROUP_DELIVER notification is displayed correctly; unknown group_id logs warn and does not crash
